title: VIVANCO TVA 4040 Full HD Amplified Indoor TV Aerial

keySpecs.label: Optimised for Full HD digital TV and DAB radio

offers: Spread the cost on orders £99 & over.
Get up to 2 months of Apple Music, Apple Fitness+ and Apple Arcade with this product.

OVERVIEW.Suitable for: Digital, Analogue, Radio, HDTV, DAB, DVB-T, DAB+, DVB-T2

FEATURES.Dimensions: 95 x 175 x 225 mm (H x W x D)
FEATURES.Box contents: Vivanco TVA 4040 Full HD Amplified Indoor TV Aerial, 2 m Aerial cable, 1 m USB cable

description.main: If you're struggling to get a clear TV or radio signal, the Vivanco TVA 4040 Amplified Indoor TV Aerial is here to help. Optimised for both analog and digital TV reception with a mobile signal filter and curved design.
goodToKnow: Optimised for analogue and digital TV reception
Curved design hides behind TV or cabinet
